_researchNotes: The #1 documented vendor scam: overpayment by certified check, wire back the difference to a 'planner'.
subject: DJ BOOKING for my daughter wedding
textBody: Hello, I am hearing impaired so I can only do email. I want to book you for my daughter wedding. My financier will send you a certified check above your fee and you will wire the difference to the event planner via western union immediately. Kindly send your full name and address.
